properties.name: app.datasource.ssl.enabled
properties.description: Whether PostgreSQL SSL truststore settings should be applied.

properties.name: app.datasource.ssl.trust-store
properties.description: Path to the JKS truststore used by PostgreSQL SSL connections.

properties.name: app.datasource.ssl.trust-store-password
properties.description: Password for the PostgreSQL SSL truststore.

properties.name: app.datasource.ssl.trust-store-type
properties.description: Type of the PostgreSQL SSL truststore, for example JKS.
